rationale: Gov't Code §2306.0723 governs rulemaking procedures for the department's annual low income housing report. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The department shall consider the annual low income housing report to be a rule and in developing the report shall follow rulemaking procedures required by Chapter 2001.
_note: No relationship between cited rule and proposed homestead exemption increase.
